# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create Kafka broker configuration file (server.properties) for production deployment. Configure listeners, log directories, and replication settings. Set up Zookeeper connection and broker ID. This is for our distributed Kafka cluster.
# Category: kafka_topic_authorization

# server.properties (Kafka Broker Configuration File - Production Deployment) 

# Listeners configuration, adjust as per your requirements  
listeners=PLAINTEXT://localhost:9092 # for client applications to connect and send messages in plaintext mode   
listeners=SSL://localhost:9093 # For secure connections (TLS/SSL) 
# listeners can be added multiple times, separated by commas.  

# Log directories configuration - adjust as per your requirements    
log.dirs=/path-to-your-directory1:/path-to-another-directory2:... # for two log files   
log.retention.minutes=1440  # retain logs by default, set to the number of minutes you want it retained  
# multiple directories can be added separated with a colon (':')    

# Replication settings configuration - adjust as per your requirements     
replication.factor = 3    # replication factor for topic-level partitioning and data safety 
min.insync.replicas=1   # minimum number of replicas to maintain in sync replica set, default is one (unless specified otherwise)    
# if you want more than two brokers as a cluster then specify the following settings   
initial.replicas = 2      # initial replication factor for each topic-partition 
max.replicas=3           # maximum number of replicas to maintain in sync replica set, default is one (unless specified otherwise)  
# if you want more than two brokers as a cluster then specify the following settings
